skill: Systems of two linear equations in two variables
stem:
2y=8x-14

One of the two equations in a linear system is given. The system has no solution. Which of the following could be the other equation in the system?
rationale: Choice D is correct. The given equation 2y = 8x - 14 simplifies to y = 4x - 7 (slope 4, intercept -7). For no solution, the partner line must have slope 4 and a different intercept. Choice D, y = 4x + 5, satisfies this. Choices A and C are equivalent to the given line. Choice B has a different slope, so the system would have a unique solution.
